evals.expected_output: Should trigger consolidate-memory skill. Should read all memory files, identify issues (stale entries, contradictions, relative dates, duplicates), fix them, update MEMORY.md index, re-index knowledge base, stamp .last-dream, reset .session-count, and report what changed.

evals.prompt: I just got promoted to Senior Engineer at Acme Corp, remember that. Also my team lead is now Sarah Chen.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger update-memory skill. Should update USER.md with new role, create or update People/Sarah-Chen.md, update Projects/ if Acme Corp project exists, add timestamped entry to MEMORY.md, use [[links]] between files, and re-index.

evals.prompt: what have I been working on lately?
evals.expected_output: Should trigger load-memory skill. Should read MEMORY.md first (temporal query), search knowledge base for recent activity, synthesize naturally without saying 'I loaded your memory', reference specific projects and decisions from memory files.
